message: joyfully invite you to an intimate celebration of marriage filled with flowers, blessings, and the warmth of loved ones.
time_line: Ceremony at 5:30 PM | Dinner at 8:00 PM
family_lines: Son of Nidhi and Rohan Nanda
Daughter of Anjali and Manav Arora
event_highlights: Open-air vows beneath a floral arch
Live acoustic music and candlelit dinner

schedule.name: Welcome High Tea
schedule.detail: Guests are welcomed with floral refreshments and light music in the garden lounge.

schedule.name: Wedding Ceremony
schedule.detail: Exchange of vows, varmala, and sacred rituals under an evening sky.

schedule.name: Dinner Reception
schedule.detail: A slow candlelit dinner with speeches, music, and celebration.

footer_note: Your presence will make our garden celebration even more beautiful.
